# command-palette

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Cmd+K command palette primitive. Plugins contribute commands via CommandPalette.Item; the dialog renders them with fuzzy search and keyboard navigation.
- Web:
  - Slots: `CommandPalette.Item`
  - Contributes: `Core.Root` → `CommandPaletteRoot`
  - Uses: `primitives/css/clip.Clip`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/surface.Surface`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Dialog`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.DialogContent`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.ScrollArea`, `primitives/tooltip.Kbd`
  - Exports: Types: `CommandPaletteItem`; Values: `CommandPalette`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
